# Sandur Productions — Independent Film Production House

> Official website of Sandur Productions, an independent student-led production house founded by Amogha Raj Sandur. We craft cinematic stories that move, inspire, and provoke thought.

## Links
- [Full Documentation](https://sandurproductions.vercel.app/llms-full.txt)

## About

Sandur Productions is an independent student-led production house founded by Amogha Raj Sandur. Based in India, we create cinematic stories — from gripping web series to compelling short films. Founded in 2026.

## Languages

- English (en) — Default
- Hindi (hi)
- Kannada (kn)

- Home: /[locale]/

- Terms of Use: /[locale]/terms
- GDPR Compliance: /[locale]/gdpr

## Projects

### THE SCAM
- Type: Finance Web Series
- Genre: Finance / Drama
- Language: English
- Description: A gripping finance web series exploring the world of financial fraud and deception.

### UTTARA
- Type: Short Film
- Genre: Short Film
- Language: English
- Description: A compelling short film by Sandur Productions.
